question: Tell me about a time you led a cross-functional initiative under tight constraints.
candidateAnswer: Yeah, so I've done a lot of cross-functional work. I usually try to make sure everyone is on the same page and we communicate well. There was a project that was challenging but I think we did a good job in the end. I learned a lot from it.
idealFollowUpExamples: Can you walk me through the specific project? What was the constraint and what did you personally do?
